metadata.name: London Counter-Trend Fractal Break
metadata.author: Quant_Lab_Alpha
metadata.rationale: Tests if counter-trend fractals printed in London during a strong 1D trend act as liquidity traps that get broken before the session ends.

long_trigger.comment: 1D is Bullish, London prints a Fake Resistance Fractal. We buy to break it.

short_trigger.comment: 1D is Bearish, London prints a Fake Support Fractal. We sell to break it.
